author: hollowstrawberry
description: Creates an interactive view which lets the bot owner open or save the bot's latest logs at that point in time. The view will dissapear after a while. Useful if you're not currently in a position to access the host machine.
install_msg:
📜 __**Logs**__
```Cog installed. Instructions:
1. Load it with [p]load logs
2. View your bot's logs with [p]logs```
short: Owner cog to show the latest logs.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any user data.
